name: City of Taos Parks-Recreation
description: City of Taos Parks-Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jefferson City, MO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Jefferson City Area YMCA - Firley Center
description: Jefferson City Area YMCA - Firley Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jefferson City, MO. There are 12 concrete courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Lincoln University Tennis Courts
description: Lincoln University Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Jefferson City, MO. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: St. Joseph Cathedral School
description: St. Joseph Cathedral School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jefferson City, MO. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: St. Martin's Catholic Church and School
description: St. Martin's Catholic Church and School is a place to play pickleball in Jefferson City, MO. There are 2 indoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: St Stanislaus
description: Come play pickleball at St Stanislaus in Jefferson City, MO! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: The Linc Wellness and Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at The Linc Wellness and Recreation Center in Jefferson City, MO! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Washington Park
description: Washington Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jefferson City, MO. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water.
